gate_status.caveat: Strict gate ARMED 400/400 complete. Gate strict_cohort_trade_ids len=400 unique=399; duplicate: open_SOFI_2026-04-01T15:25:47.839207+00:00 (x2). Edge script uses set → 399 rows. SRE-EDGE-001: dedupe in gate/export.

pnl_headline.tail_note: Largest observed loss ~ -16.8 USD (NIO); largest win ~ +10.8 USD (MRNA) in this rollup.

top_winning_slices.mechanism: V2 decay band correlates with profitable exits when thesis still valid.
Similar decay band; high win rate — exits align with favorable drift.
Labeled regime path captures majority of positive expectancy.
Long book carries aggregate edge in cohort.
Mid-high decay exits with strong win rate.

top_losing_slices.mechanism: High decay score exits often crystallize losses or late giveback.
Extreme decay band; toxic conditional expectancy.
Low decay + adverse path — exits may fire in chop.
Flow reversal urgency without confirmation — whipsaw exits.
Missing entry regime telemetry — sizing/gating blind.

recommendations.target: Entries when exit path historically signal_decay(0.83–0.85) AND entry_regime=mixed
recommendations.mechanism: Positive expectancy concentrated in labeled regime and specific decay outcomes.
recommendations.action: Promote size only when entry_regime != unknown and composite agrees; paper A/B +10% size cap on qualifying signals.
recommendations.expected_impact: +3–15 USD/session equivalent at current trade frequency (order-of-magnitude; verify on next 50 trades)
recommendations.risk: Overfit to decay string labels; regime shift.
recommendations.verify: Holdout week: compare PnL and max DD vs control; require ARMED gate throughout.

recommendations.mechanism: Same exit family destroys expectancy when fired without path context.
recommendations.action: Add branch: require min hold OR MFE capture OR drawdown-from-peak rule before allowing 0.93+ decay flat exit; tune in replay.
recommendations.expected_impact: Reduce ~28–42 USD cumulative drag if half of toxic exits avoided (backtest-bound)
recommendations.risk: Longer holds increase tail loss in crashes.
recommendations.verify: Replay 30d with counterfactual exit rule; monitor median hold and worst-case.

recommendations.mechanism: Unknown regime rows underperform mixed by ~0.76 USD/trade average delta.
recommendations.action: Ensure mark_open / metadata always stamps entry_regime; interim GATE-IN: half size when unknown until ARMED telemetry proof.
recommendations.expected_impact: ~10–25 USD recovered if unknown bucket behaves like mixed post-fix (provisional)
recommendations.risk: False regime labels could block good trades.
recommendations.verify: unknown count -> 0 on new closes for 5 sessions; slice PnL improves.

recommendations.mechanism: Single-bar reversal sensitivity exits losers with 25% win rate.
recommendations.action: Add confirmation (second signal, min magnitude, or delay N minutes) before flow_reversal forces exit.
recommendations.expected_impact: 5–15 USD if 30% fewer false reversal exits
recommendations.verify: Label reversal exits pre/post rule; compare MAE and PnL.

recommendations.target: Strict chain at close + daily integrity
recommendations.mechanism: Learning-grade requires complete chain every close.
recommendations.action: Keep strict_chain_backfill_before_strict_gate + alert if trades_incomplete>0; add daily generated integrity markdown to evidence/; optional fail-closed on promotion scripts if not ARMED.
recommendations.expected_impact: Prevents silent learning corruption; faster re-arm
recommendations.verify: Inject incomplete trade in staging; alert fires; backfill restores ARMED.

recommendations.mechanism: Short expectancy near flat (-0.002 USD/trade) — not primary leak.
recommendations.action: Do not disable shorts; maintain size; revisit only if exit toxicity correlates with short-only path.
recommendations.risk: Missed short-specific leak if masked by aggregation.
